arguments.prompt: Create a highly polished pixel art game boss sprite: the Warden Angel from MAUSOLEUM ENGINE, a solemn holy-machine guardian. Massive white-gold armor, thick circular halo ring above the head, dark blue helm face, large cyan-blue chest gem, layered white wings with deep blue shadow feathers, ornate staff with blue sanctum crystal, ancient cathedral-machine authority, elegant and oppressive, not demonic, not bloody, not cute. Centered full-body sprite, transparent background, animation-ready silhouette. Preserve the approved Warden benchmark traits exactly: halo, helm-head silhouette, central blue gem, white-gold armor, wing hierarchy, and staff silhouette.

negative_prompt: photorealistic, 3D render, anime illustration, painterly blur, smooth gradients, noisy dithering, messy antialiasing, chibi exaggeration, generic fantasy goblin, generic king, generic knight, cute toy drone, sci-fi spaceship, cyberpunk neon overload, gore, blood, exposed organs, self-harm, copied sprite, existing game character, logo, text, UI, background scene
